title: Reject lifecycle leader sizing split
summary: SPY-relative leader lifecycle sizing split failed fixed-window EV tests.
acceptance_checks: Three canonical fixed windows measured with docs/backtesting.md snapshots.
Single causal variable tested: lifecycle-specific total risk multiplier inside otherwise-unmodified risk_on SPY-relative leaders.
No production strategy code promoted because all variants failed Gate 4.
best_observation: Breakout leader 2.25x added $1,147 aggregate PnL but EV fell -0.0142 and regressed in 2 windows.
follow_up: Use event/news or richer lifecycle evidence before revisiting SPY-relative leader splits.
